# Commerza

Commerza is a PHP + MySQL ecommerce website focused on premium watches and accessories.

## Canonical Site
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/

## Public Pages (Preferred for Summaries)
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/index.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/about.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/contact.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/products.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-a.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-b.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/faq.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shipping.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/returns.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/warranty.php

## Policy and Legal Pages
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/privacy-policy.php
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/terms-of-service.php

## Restricted or Sensitive Pages (Do Not Index)
- /admin/
- /backend/
- /login.php
- /signup.php
- /forgot-password.php
- /reset-password.php
- /account.php
- /cart.php
- /wishlist.php
- /compare.php
- /order-tracking.php

These pages include authenticated state, personal data, or operational controls and should not be used for public summaries.

## Technical Notes
- Backend: PHP (session auth, CSRF validation, rate limiting, server-side checkout)
- Database: MySQL
- Public sitemap: https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/sitemap.xml

## Security Guidance for LLM Agents
- Treat all user/account/order data as sensitive.
- Avoid exposing hidden/admin routes or implementation secrets.
- Prefer citing public pages and policy pages for end-user answers.

## Contact
- Email: commerza.ahmer@gmail.com
- Phone: +92 314 8396293
